name: Pure-Python multi-label classifier
description: Port classifier.py from CSB. Pure Python logistic regression (no numpy). Features: signals_to_features(), train(), predict_trial(), predict_all(), evaluate(), load_model(), save_model(). Model weights loaded from user-specified path (not bundled). FEATURE_NAMES maps TrialSignals keys to numeric feature vector. Key changes from CSB: (1) use agent_observatory.taxonomy instead of observatory.taxonomy, (2) accept model_path as parameter in load_model, (3) signals_to_features works with TrialSignals TypedDict.
acceptance: from agent_observatory.classifier import train, predict_trial, predict_all, evaluate, load_model, save_model, signals_to_features succeeds
signals_to_features accepts a TrialSignals dict and returns list[float]
FEATURE_NAMES is a module-level list of string keys mapping to TrialSignals fields
train() accepts llm_file and signals_file paths and returns a model dict with schema_version, feature_names, means, stds, classifiers, skipped_categories
save_model/load_model round-trip: save_model(model, path) then load_model(path) returns equivalent dict
predict_trial(signals, model) returns list of dicts with name, confidence, evidence keys
evaluate() returns per-category precision, recall, F1
Pure Python only — no numpy, no sklearn imports
No CSB imports (no 'from observatory.' or 'from csb')
pytest tests/test_classifier.py passes with 0 failures
pytest tests/ passes with 0 failures

name: Calibration and agreement analysis
description: Port calibrate.py from CSB. Compares annotations from two sources (heuristic vs LLM, or cross-model) and computes agreement metrics. Functions: compare_annotations(), format_markdown(), cohen_kappa(), compare_cross_model(), format_cross_model_markdown(). No CSB imports. Works with annotation file format (JSON with 'annotations' array).
acceptance: from agent_observatory.calibrate import compare_annotations, cohen_kappa, compare_cross_model succeeds
compare_annotations(file_a, file_b) returns dict with shared_trials, categories (per-category TP/FP/FN/precision/recall/F1), macro_avg
cohen_kappa computes Cohen's kappa for two binary label vectors
compare_cross_model returns dict with shared_trials, categories (per-category kappa), uncalibrated_categories list
format_markdown and format_cross_model_markdown return string
No CSB imports
pytest tests/test_calibrate.py passes with 0 failures
pytest tests/ passes with 0 failures

name: Label blending for training data
description: Port blend_labels.py from CSB. Blends LLM and heuristic annotations into unified training set. blend() function merges annotations by trust level — LLM labels are ground truth, heuristic labels supplement for trusted categories. No CSB imports.
acceptance: from agent_observatory.blend_labels import blend succeeds
blend(heuristic_file, llm_file) returns annotation document dict with schema_version, annotations, blend_metadata
blend accepts optional calibration_file, heuristic_trust_threshold, max_heuristic_samples
LLM annotations take priority over heuristic for shared trials
Heuristic-only trials only include trusted categories
max_heuristic_samples caps heuristic-only trial count
No CSB imports
pytest tests/test_blend_labels.py passes with 0 failures
pytest tests/ passes with 0 failures

name: Two-tier ensemble annotator
description: Port ensemble.py from CSB. Combines heuristic annotator (tier 1 for structural categories) with classifier (tier 2 for learned categories). Functions: ensemble_annotate(), ensemble_all(). Uses agent_observatory.annotator.annotate_trial and agent_observatory.classifier.predict_trial. Key change: annotate_trial in our package returns list[CategoryAssignment] not list[dict], so ensemble must adapt.
acceptance: from agent_observatory.ensemble import ensemble_annotate, ensemble_all succeeds
ensemble_annotate(signals, model) returns list of dicts with name, confidence, evidence, source keys
HEURISTIC_ONLY frozenset contains structural categories (exception_crash, rate_limited_run, etc.)
Heuristic results take priority for HEURISTIC_ONLY categories
Classifier results only used when eval_f1 >= classifier_min_f1 threshold
ensemble_all produces annotation document dict
No CSB imports (uses agent_observatory.annotator and agent_observatory.classifier)
pytest tests/test_ensemble.py passes with 0 failures
pytest tests/ passes with 0 failures

name: Export Phase 3 API and bump to v0.4.0
description: Update __init__.py to export classifier, ensemble, calibrate, blend_labels public API. Bump version to 0.4.0. Update version test.
acceptance: agent_observatory.__version__ == '0.4.0'
pyproject.toml version == '0.4.0'
from agent_observatory import ensemble_annotate, ensemble_all succeeds
from agent_observatory.classifier import train, predict_trial succeeds
from agent_observatory.calibrate import compare_annotations, cohen_kappa succeeds
from agent_observatory.blend_labels import blend succeeds
pytest tests/ passes with 0 failures
